headline: Mixed user feedback highlights performance and ad concerns, with opportunities to improve reliability and support
key_findings: Users report frequent performance issues including slow analytics, crashes, and lag after updates.
Excessive and intrusive ads in the free version cause significant dissatisfaction.
Problems with subscription management: double payments, price hikes, and ads not removed after premium purchase.
Reliability issues such as data loss, sync failures, and app crashes undermine trust.
Customer support is inconsistent, with slow responses and template answers failing to resolve issues.
action_items: Optimize app performance and stability, focusing on startup speed, search, and importing tasks.
Reduce ad frequency or ensure premium users have ads fully removed; consider a cheaper ad-free option.
Fix subscription billing errors and improve transparency in pricing to prevent double charges.
Improve customer support by reducing response times and providing personalized, non-template solutions.
Enhance data synchronization reliability and backup speed to prevent data loss.
